ddls:
CREATE TABLE "media_files" (
  "media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media file */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the media file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the media file (e.g., video, audio) */,
  "file_size" TEXT /* Size of the media file */,
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the quality of the media file */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the language of the media file */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date the media file was added */,
  "clicks" INTEGER /* Number of clicks or downloads the media file has received */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the media file */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content category */,
  "copyright_info" TEXT /* Copyright information for the media file */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags or keywords for the media file */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the media file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_files_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_files_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_files_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES content_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_files_quality_id FOREIGN KEY ("quality_id") REFERENCES qualities ("quality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "qualities" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality option */,
  "quality_name" TEXT /* Name of the quality option (e.g., HD 720p) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the quality option */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the quality option (e.g., 1280x720) */,
  "bitrate" INTEGER /* Bitrate of the quality option (e.g., 5000 kbps) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language option */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language (e.g., English, Spanish) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the language */,
  "code" TEXT /* Language code (e.g., en, es) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., regular user, admin, moderator) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "media_downloads" (
  "download_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each download event */,
  "media_id" INTEGER /* ID of the media file being downloaded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user downloading the media file */,
  "download_date" TEXT /* Date the media file was downloaded */,
  "download_type" TEXT /* Type of download (e.g., view, download) */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for the download (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "browser" TEXT /* Browser used for the download (e.g., Chrome, Firefox) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("download_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_downloads_media_id FOREIGN KEY ("media_id") REFERENCES media_files ("media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_downloads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preferred quality */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preferred language */,
  "notification_preference" INTEGER /* Whether the user wants to receive notifications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_quality_id FOREIGN KEY ("quality_id") REFERENCES qualities ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content version */,
  "media_id" INTEGER /* ID of the media file */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the media file */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the version (e.g., changes made) */,
  "change_log" TEXT /* Change log for the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_versions_media_id FOREIGN KEY ("media_id") REFERENCES media_files ("media_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role (e.g., admin, moderator) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, logout, download) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details about the activity */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for the activity */,
  "browser" TEXT /* Browser used for the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the content category (e.g., movies, music) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the content category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "media_id" INTEGER /* ID of the media file */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review text given by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_ratings_media_id FOREIGN KEY ("media_id") REFERENCES media_files ("media_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "media_id" INTEGER /* ID of the media file */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment text given by the user */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the comment was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_comments_media_id FOREIGN KEY ("media_id") REFERENCES media_files ("media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "media_id" INTEGER /* ID of the media file */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views */,
  "downloads" INTEGER /* Number of downloads */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes */,
  "dislikes" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_analytics_media_id FOREIGN KEY ("media_id") REFERENCES media_files ("media_id")
)
